title: Test T27 decompose config disabled fallback
description: Run test case T27 to verify that when decompose.enabled: false is set in kody.config.json, the @kody decompose command immediately falls back to normal pipeline without attempting decomposition. Steps: 1) Temporarily set decompose.enabled: false in kody.config.json via gh api, 2) Create temp issue and comment @kody decompose, 3) Verify logs show 'decompose disabled in config — falling back to normal pipeline', 4) Confirm no decompose artifacts created, 5) Revert config change (mandatory cleanup).
existing_patterns: .kody/watch/agents/test-suite/agent.md:1033-1062 — T27 test steps with setup via gh api, verification via gh run view --log, and mandatory cleanup to revert config
node_modules/.pnpm/@kody-ade+engine@0.1.0/node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js:8589 — Implementation checks config.decompose?.enabled === false and calls fallbackToPipeline
